brief_notes: Well-written narrative covering the same multi-technique study but tables are less detailed. The K+ calcium response table has p-values but lacks AUC values. Pharmacology results are described mostly in text. Proteomics table uses directional descriptors without fold-change values. Calcium frequency-response table lacks numerical AUC data. The glucose consumption table is adequate with actual values. The mouse lines table is informative. Overall the text carries the key statistics but the tabular presentation is inconsistent in quantitative detail.
